title: astragalus johannis-howellii
intro: Astragalus johannis-howellii, also known as Johannis Howell's milkvetch, is a species of legume native to the southwestern United States. This perennial herb is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus johannis-howellii has been used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, making it a valuable herb for various health benefits, including reducing fatigue and improving sleep quality. In herbal preparations, the roots of Astragalus johannis-howellii are typically dried and used in teas, capsules, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
